title: Kelly's Origins+
description: Simply contains Origins and optimization. Nothing unnecessary.
body:
A modpack made for simply playing Origins without lag or anything unnecessary. Created for Kelly and his friends. Give this pack a try if you feel like no-nonsense Origins with your friends!

With the Origins mod you can live like you would if you were anything from mystical beasts to small little gremlins. Each of them have their own powers and abilities! And with mods like Sodium and Iris you can enjoy speedy performance and beautiful shaders!
